turns.query: Identify PM2.5 concentration peak timing across all 18 monitoring stations on 2025-06-10, calculate station-specific peak hours, determine spatial clustering of peak times, and correlate with traffic congestion data from nearby road segments to establish traffic-pollution relationships.
turns.actual_response:
On 2025-06-10, PM2.5 data were available for all 18 monitoring stations, with 394 hourly readings included.

Station-specific PM2.5 peak hours were:

| Station | Peak hour | Peak PM2.5 |
|---|---:|---:|
| Tseung Kwan O | 00:00 | 16.8 |
| Tuen Mun | 00:00 | 11.0 |
| Tung Chung | 00:00 | 11.6 |
| Central | 02:00 | 18.0 |
| Tai Po | 03:00 | 6.9 |
| Yuen Long | 06:00 | 7.5 |
| Tap Mun | 08:00 | 8.3 |
| Sha Tin | 08:00 | 7.4 |
| North | 14:00 | 11.3 |
| Eastern | 18:00 | 7.6 |
| Causeway Bay | 19:00 | 18.6 |
| Kwun Tong | 20:00 | 6.4 |
| Sham Shui Po | 20:00 | 8.0 |
| Mong Kok | 21:00 | 14.1 |
| Central/Western | 21:00 | 6.5 |
| Tsuen Wan | 21:00 | 8.4 |
| Kwai Chung | 22:00 | 9.7 |
| Southern | 23:00 | 5.8 |

The highest PM2.5 peak was recorded at Causeway Bay, at 19:00, with PM2.5 concentration of 18.6.

Peak timing was not uniform across Hong Kong. The most common peak hours were 00:00 and 21:00, each occurring at 3 stations. Evening and late-night peaks were prominent: 8 stations peaked between 18:00 and 23:00, while 6 stations peaked between 00:00 and 08:00.

Spatially, nearby stations showed more similar peak timing than distant stations. Station pairs within 7 km had same-hour or adjacent-hour PM2.5 peaks in 34.5% of cases, compared with only 8.2% for station pairs more than 15 km apart. The average difference in peak timing increased with distance: 3.5 hours for stations within 3 km, 4.0 hours for 3–7 km, 4.51 hours for 7–15 km, and 6.11 hours beyond 15 km. This indicates spatial clustering of peak times, with closer stations tending to experience PM2.5 peaks at more similar times.

Traffic-pollution relationships were assessed using nearby road-segment congestion data for all 18 stations. Across all matched station-hours, PM2.5 had a positive correlation with congestion of 0.427 and a negative correlation with road speed of -0.156. At the station level, the average PM2.5–congestion correlation was 0.167, and 77.8% of stations showed a positive PM2.5–congestion relationship.

Lag analysis showed the strongest association with same-hour congestion:  
- same-hour congestion correlation: 0.427  
- 1-hour prior congestion correlation: 0.421  
- 2-hour prior congestion correlation: 0.363  
- 3-hour prior congestion correlation: 0.306  

This pattern indicates that PM2.5 concentrations were most closely associated with concurrent or very recent traffic congestion, with the relationship weakening over longer lags.

At the actual PM2.5 peak hours, congestion was only slightly higher than each station’s daily average on average, with a mean difference of +0.015 and a median difference of -0.002. Therefore, although traffic congestion and PM2.5 were positively associated overall, individual station peak PM2.5 events were not consistently accompanied by above-average local congestion at the exact peak hour.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from sqlalchemy import text
from math import radians, sin, cos, asin, sqrt

day_start, day_end = "2025-06-10 00:00:00", "2025-06-11 00:00:00"
nearby_m = 500

# Count PM2.5 readings for the day before retrieving station-hour data
pm_count = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE datetime >= :s AND datetime < :e AND pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end})["n"].iat[0]

pm_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT h.station_id, s.name_en, h.datetime, h.pm2_5,
       ST_X(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
WHERE h.datetime >= :s AND h.datetime < :e AND h.pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY h.station_id, h.datetime
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end})
pm_df["datetime"] = pd.to_datetime(pm_df["datetime"])
pm_df["hour"] = pm_df["datetime"].dt.hour

# Station-specific PM2.5 peak timing; ties resolved by earliest hour of the daily maximum
idx = pm_df.sort_values(["station_id", "pm2_5", "datetime"], ascending=[True, False, True]).groupby("station_id").head(1).index
peaks = pm_df.loc[idx, ["station_id", "name_en", "hour", "pm2_5", "lon", "lat"]].sort_values("station_id").reset_index(drop=True)
station_peak_hours = {int(r.station_id): int(r.hour) for r in peaks.itertuples()}
most_polluted_station_id = int(peaks.loc[peaks["pm2_5"].idxmax(), "station_id"])
n_stations = int(pm_df["station_id"].nunique())

# Spatial clustering/similarity of peak times
def hav_m(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2):
    R=6371000.0
    lon1,lat1,lon2,lat2=map(radians,[lon1,lat1,lon2,lat2])
    dlon, dlat = lon2-lon1, lat2-lat1
    a = sin(dlat/2)**2 + cos(lat1)*cos(lat2)*sin(dlon/2)**2
    return 2*R*asin(sqrt(a))
def circ_hour_diff(a,b):
    d=abs(int(a)-int(b))%24
    return min(d,24-d)

pairs=[]
for i in range(len(peaks)):
    for j in range(i+1,len(peaks)):
        a,b=peaks.iloc[i],peaks.iloc[j]
        pairs.append((hav_m(a.lon,a.lat,b.lon,b.lat), circ_hour_diff(a.hour,b.hour), int(a.station_id), int(b.station_id)))
pair_df=pd.DataFrame(pairs, columns=["distance_m","peak_hour_diff","station_a","station_b"])
near_pair_summary = pair_df.assign(bin=pd.cut(pair_df["distance_m"], [0,3000,7000,15000,1e9], labels=["≤3 km","3–7 km","7–15 km",">15 km"])).groupby("bin", observed=True)["peak_hour_diff"].agg(["count","mean","median"]).round(2)
same_or_adj_near = pair_df[pair_df["distance_m"] <= 7000]["peak_hour_diff"].le(1).mean() if (pair_df["distance_m"] <= 7000).any() else np.nan
same_or_adj_far = pair_df[pair_df["distance_m"] > 15000]["peak_hour_diff"].le(1).mean() if (pair_df["distance_m"] > 15000).any() else np.nan

# Count nearby traffic records before retrieving aggregated station-hour congestion
traffic_count = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM air_quality_station s
JOIN road_segment r ON ST_DWithin(s.coordinate, r.geometry::geography, :d)
JOIN hourly_road_segment_traffic t ON t.road_segment_id = r.id
WHERE t.datetime >= :s AND t.datetime < :e AND t.congestion_index IS NOT NULL
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end, "d": nearby_m})["n"].iat[0]

traffic_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT s.id AS station_id, t.datetime,
       AVG(t.congestion_index) AS avg_congestion,
       AVG(t.speed) AS avg_speed,
       COUNT(*) AS n_nearby_road_hour_records
FROM air_quality_station s
JOIN road_segment r ON ST_DWithin(s.coordinate, r.geometry::geography, :d)
JOIN hourly_road_segment_traffic t ON t.road_segment_id = r.id
WHERE t.datetime >= :s AND t.datetime < :e AND t.congestion_index IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.id, t.datetime
ORDER BY s.id, t.datetime
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end, "d": nearby_m})
traffic_df["datetime"] = pd.to_datetime(traffic_df["datetime"])

merged = pm_df.merge(traffic_df, on=["station_id","datetime"], how="inner")
overall_corr = merged[["pm2_5","avg_congestion","avg_speed"]].corr(method="pearson").loc["pm2_5"].round(3).to_dict() if len(merged) >= 3 else {}
station_corr = (merged.groupby("station_id")
                .apply(lambda g: g["pm2_5"].corr(g["avg_congestion"]) if len(g)>=3 and g["avg_congestion"].nunique()>1 and g["pm2_5"].nunique()>1 else np.nan)
                .dropna().rename("corr_pm25_congestion").reset_index())
if not station_corr.empty:
    corr_summary = station_corr["corr_pm25_congestion"].agg(["count","mean","median","min","max"]).round(3).to_dict()
    pos_frac = float((station_corr["corr_pm25_congestion"] > 0).mean())
else:
    corr_summary, pos_frac = {}, np.nan

# Compare congestion at each station's PM2.5 peak hour vs its daily station average
peak_cong = peaks[["station_id","hour"]].merge(traffic_df.assign(hour=traffic_df["datetime"].dt.hour), on=["station_id","hour"], how="left")
daily_cong = traffic_df.groupby("station_id")["avg_congestion"].mean().rename("daily_avg_congestion").reset_index()
peak_cong = peak_cong.merge(daily_cong, on="station_id", how="left")
peak_cong["peak_minus_daily_congestion"] = peak_cong["avg_congestion"] - peak_cong["daily_avg_congestion"]
peak_cong_summary = peak_cong["peak_minus_daily_congestion"].agg(["count","mean","median","min","max"]).round(3).to_dict()

# Lag correlations: same-hour congestion and previous 1-3 hours, across available station-hours
lag_corr={}
for lag in [0,1,2,3]:
    tmp=traffic_df.copy()
    tmp["datetime"] = tmp["datetime"] + pd.Timedelta(hours=lag)
    m=pm_df.merge(tmp[["station_id","datetime","avg_congestion"]], on=["station_id","datetime"], how="inner")
    lag_corr[f"congestion_{lag}h_before"] = round(float(m["pm2_5"].corr(m["avg_congestion"])),3) if len(m)>=3 and m["avg_congestion"].nunique()>1 else np.nan

print("PM2.5 readings counted:", int(pm_count), "| stations with PM2.5 data:", n_stations)
print("Stored station_peak_hours:", station_peak_hours)
print("Stored most_polluted_station_id:", most_polluted_station_id)
print("Peak-hour distribution:", peaks.groupby("hour")["station_id"].count().sort_index().to_dict())
print("Highest station peak:", peaks.loc[peaks["pm2_5"].idxmax(), ["station_id","name_en","hour","pm2_5"]].to_dict())
print("Peak timing by station summary sample:", peaks[["station_id","name_en","hour","pm2_5"]].sort_values(["hour","station_id"]).head(10).to_dict("records"))
print("Spatial peak-time difference by distance band:", near_pair_summary.to_dict())
print("Share of station pairs with same/adjacent peak hour: ≤7 km =", round(float(same_or_adj_near),3), "; >15 km =", round(float(same_or_adj_far),3))
print("Nearby traffic records counted:", int(traffic_count), "| merged station-hours:", int(len(merged)), "| stations with merged data:", int(merged["station_id"].nunique()))
print("Overall PM2.5 correlations:", overall_corr)
print("Station-level PM2.5-vs-congestion correlation summary:", corr_summary, "| positive fraction:", None if pd.isna(pos_frac) else round(pos_frac,3))
print("Lag correlations:", lag_corr)
print("Congestion at PM2.5 peak minus station daily congestion summary:", peak_cong_summary)

import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from sqlalchemy import text

# Use K-nearest road segments per station to avoid expensive all-segment distance joins.
k_nearest_roads = 5

station_roads = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT s.id AS station_id, r.id AS road_segment_id,
       ST_Distance(s.coordinate, r.geometry::geography) AS distance_m
FROM air_quality_station s
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT id, geometry
    FROM road_segment
    ORDER BY geometry <-> s.coordinate::geometry
    LIMIT :k
) r
ORDER BY s.id, distance_m
"""), engine, params={"k": k_nearest_roads})

unique_roads = tuple(int(x) for x in station_roads["road_segment_id"].unique())
traffic_count2 = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
WHERE datetime >= :s AND datetime < :e
  AND congestion_index IS NOT NULL
  AND road_segment_id = ANY(:road_ids)
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end, "road_ids": list(unique_roads)})["n"].iat[0]

traffic_raw = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT road_segment_id, datetime, congestion_index, speed
FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
WHERE datetime >= :s AND datetime < :e
  AND congestion_index IS NOT NULL
  AND road_segment_id = ANY(:road_ids)
"""), engine, params={"s": day_start, "e": day_end, "road_ids": list(unique_roads)})
traffic_raw["datetime"] = pd.to_datetime(traffic_raw["datetime"])

traffic_df = (station_roads[["station_id","road_segment_id"]]
              .merge(traffic_raw, on="road_segment_id", how="inner")
              .groupby(["station_id","datetime"], as_index=False)
              .agg(avg_congestion=("congestion_index","mean"),
                   avg_speed=("speed","mean"),
                   n_nearby_road_hour_records=("road_segment_id","count")))

merged = pm_df.merge(traffic_df, on=["station_id","datetime"], how="inner")
overall_corr = merged[["pm2_5","avg_congestion","avg_speed"]].corr(method="pearson").loc["pm2_5"].round(3).to_dict() if len(merged) >= 3 else {}

station_corr = (merged.groupby("station_id")
                .apply(lambda g: g["pm2_5"].corr(g["avg_congestion"]) if len(g)>=3 and g["avg_congestion"].nunique()>1 and g["pm2_5"].nunique()>1 else np.nan)
                .dropna().rename("corr_pm25_congestion").reset_index())
if not station_corr.empty:
    corr_summary = station_corr["corr_pm25_congestion"].agg(["count","mean","median","min","max"]).round(3).to_dict()
    pos_frac = round(float((station_corr["corr_pm25_congestion"] > 0).mean()), 3)
else:
    corr_summary, pos_frac = {}, None

peak_cong = peaks[["station_id","hour"]].merge(traffic_df.assign(hour=traffic_df["datetime"].dt.hour), on=["station_id","hour"], how="left")
daily_cong = traffic_df.groupby("station_id")["avg_congestion"].mean().rename("daily_avg_congestion").reset_index()
peak_cong = peak_cong.merge(daily_cong, on="station_id", how="left")
peak_cong["peak_minus_daily_congestion"] = peak_cong["avg_congestion"] - peak_cong["daily_avg_congestion"]
peak_cong_summary = peak_cong["peak_minus_daily_congestion"].agg(["count","mean","median","min","max"]).round(3).to_dict()

lag_corr = {}
for lag in [0,1,2,3]:
    tmp = traffic_df.copy()
    tmp["datetime"] = tmp["datetime"] + pd.Timedelta(hours=lag)
    m = pm_df.merge(tmp[["station_id","datetime","avg_congestion"]], on=["station_id","datetime"], how="inner")
    lag_corr[f"congestion_{lag}h_before"] = round(float(m["pm2_5"].corr(m["avg_congestion"])),3) if len(m)>=3 and m["avg_congestion"].nunique()>1 else np.nan

def circ_hour_diff(a,b):
    d = abs(int(a)-int(b)) % 24
    return min(d, 24-d)

near_pair_summary = pair_df.assign(bin=pd.cut(pair_df["distance_m"], [0,3000,7000,15000,1e9], labels=["≤3 km","3–7 km","7–15 km",">15 km"])).groupby("bin", observed=True)["peak_hour_diff"].agg(["count","mean","median"]).round(2)
same_or_adj_near = pair_df[pair_df["distance_m"] <= 7000]["peak_hour_diff"].le(1).mean() if (pair_df["distance_m"] <= 7000).any() else np.nan
same_or_adj_far = pair_df[pair_df["distance_m"] > 15000]["peak_hour_diff"].le(1).mean() if (pair_df["distance_m"] > 15000).any() else np.nan

peak_table = peaks[["station_id","name_en","hour","pm2_5"]].sort_values(["hour","station_id"]).reset_index(drop=True)
nearest_road_distance_summary = station_roads.groupby("station_id")["distance_m"].min().agg(["count","mean","median","min","max"]).round(1).to_dict()

print("PM2.5 readings counted:", int(pm_count), "| stations with PM2.5 data:", n_stations)
print("Stored station_peak_hours:", station_peak_hours)
print("Stored most_polluted_station_id:", most_polluted_station_id)
print("Peak-hour distribution:", peaks.groupby("hour")["station_id"].count().sort_index().to_dict())
print("Station PM2.5 peak table:", peak_table.to_dict("records"))
print("Highest station peak:", peaks.loc[peaks["pm2_5"].idxmax(), ["station_id","name_en","hour","pm2_5"]].to_dict())
print("Spatial peak-time difference by distance band:", near_pair_summary.to_dict())
print("Share of station pairs with same/adjacent peak hour: ≤7 km =", round(float(same_or_adj_near),3), "; >15 km =", round(float(same_or_adj_far),3))
print("Nearest selected-road distance summary:", nearest_road_distance_summary)
print("Selected-road traffic records counted:", int(traffic_count2), "| merged station-hours:", int(len(merged)), "| stations with merged data:", int(merged["station_id"].nunique()))
print("Overall PM2.5 correlations:", overall_corr)
print("Station-level PM2.5-vs-congestion correlation summary:", corr_summary, "| positive fraction:", pos_frac)
print("Lag correlations:", lag_corr)
print("Congestion at PM2.5 peak minus station daily congestion summary:", peak_cong_summary)
